site: KCL, central London (SuPy sample), forcing height 40 m
episode: 2012-07-22 00:05 to 2012-07-27 00:00 (clearest 4-day summer window; day 1 excluded from metrics as spin-up)
configuration: two-way coupled T and q; wind nudged to observations (tau = 30 min); radiation and precipitation prescribed; clear-sky radiative cooling 2 K/day; urban column ventilated by a companion rural column (tau_adv = 15 km / U)
lineage: coupling strategy follows BLUEWS / SUEWS-CBL (Onomura et al. 2015, Urban Climate 11:1-23), extended with a rural-background ventilation term
